evals.expected_output: Claude reads CLAUDE.md, resolves and reads specs/add-user-profile.md, identifies 3 SEQUENTIAL tasks, plans to invoke feature-builder for each in order, plans to run the verifier skill after completion, and plans to open a PR on branch feature/add-user-profile targeting main with an acceptance checklist.
expectations: Reads CLAUDE.md before reading the spec
Resolves the spec path correctly (specs/add-user-profile.md)
Identifies all 3 tasks from the Implementation Plan
Plans to run all 3 tasks sequentially (not in parallel)
Plans to invoke feature-builder with scoped context per sub-task
Plans to run the verifier skill after all sub-tasks complete
Plans a PR on branch feature/add-user-profile targeting main
PR plan includes an acceptance checklist (one item per criterion)

evals.expected_output: Claude reads CLAUDE.md (Python/FastAPI repo), resolves specs/magic-link-auth.md, identifies the spec has multiple repo scopes, selects ONLY the Backend Scope (ignoring Frontend Scope), correctly identifies Tasks 1 and 2 as INDEPENDENT (parallel) and Task 3 as SEQUENTIAL (after the first two), then plans execution accordingly.
expectations: Reads CLAUDE.md before reading the spec
Identifies that the spec contains multiple repo scopes
Selects only the Backend Scope and ignores the Frontend Scope
Plans Tasks 1 and 2 (INDEPENDENT) to run in parallel
Plans Task 3 (SEQUENTIAL) to run only after Tasks 1 and 2 complete
Does not plan or reference any Frontend tasks
Plans to run the verifier skill after all sub-tasks complete
Plans a PR on branch feature/magic-link-auth

evals.expected_output: Claude reads CLAUDE.md (Go repo), resolves specs/add-sms-push.md, identifies Tasks 1 and 2 as INDEPENDENT (to be parallelised), Task 3 as SEQUENTIAL, passes only relevant files to each feature-builder invocation (not all loaded files), plans verifier run, and plans PR.
expectations: Reads CLAUDE.md before reading the spec
Resolves the spec path correctly (specs/add-sms-push.md)
Plans Tasks 1 and 2 (INDEPENDENT) to run in parallel via feature-builder
Plans Task 3 (SEQUENTIAL) to run only after Tasks 1 and 2 finish
Scopes context per sub-task — does not dump all loaded files to every feature-builder call
Plans to run the verifier skill after all tasks complete
Plans a PR on branch feature/add-sms-push targeting main
